subject: Probable GRB030112 seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A probable GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
03-01-12 at 04:18:29 UT. The duration of the GRB is very short at
approx. 0.15s. No position information is available. The lightcurve
is available at
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-12T04-18-29.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
